data.title: DefiLlama founder responds to Aave TVL controversy: Revolving lending impact has been eliminated.
data.description: DefiLlama founder 0xngmi stated in an article on the X platform that current claims about Aave TVL being overvalued due to revolving lending are inaccurate. He explained that in TVL statistics, lent assets are excluded, therefore revolving lending does not inflate the total locked value. For example, deposited assets are counted in TVL, while the corresponding lent portion is offset. He further added that DefiLlama had previously eliminated double counting caused by Ethena-related collateralized revolving lending, and believes the related allegations lack basis.

data.title: Germany Advocates for EU Carbon Market Review Amid Energy Transition
data.description: Germany is urging the European Union to prioritize the industrial shift towards cleaner energy in its upcoming review of the carbon market. Bloomberg posted on X that this move comes in response to increasing power and fuel prices, which have sparked criticism of the EU's primary climate strategy. The review aims to address these concerns and ensure the carbon market effectively supports the transition to sustainable energy sources.

data.title: DefiLlama Founder Clarifies Misconceptions on Aave TVL
data.description:
DefiLlama founder 0xngmi has addressed claims regarding the overestimation of Aave's Total Value Locked (TVL) due to circular lending. According to Odaily, 0xngmi stated on the X platform that these assertions are inaccurate.

He explained that in TVL calculations, lent assets are excluded, meaning circular lending does not inflate the total locked value. For instance, deposited assets are included in TVL, while the corresponding lent portion is offset. He further noted that DefiLlama has already removed duplicate calculations caused by Ethena-related collateral cycles, suggesting that the concerns lack foundation.

data.title: Netherlands Allocates €950 Million to Mitigate Iran War's Economic Impact
data.description: The Netherlands has committed over €950 million ($1.1 billion) to alleviate the economic repercussions of the Iran war on Dutch households and businesses. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the country's proactive measures to address potential fuel shortages. This financial allocation aims to cushion the impact on the economy and ensure stability amid the ongoing conflict. The Dutch government is preparing for possible disruptions in fuel supply, which could affect various sectors. This move underscores the importance of safeguarding national interests and maintaining economic resilience during international crises.

data.title: Tesla's Q1 Earnings Report: Focus on Robotaxi Timeline Amid Share Decline
data.description: Tesla is set to release its earnings report on April 22, following a decrease in Q1 deliveries to 358,023 vehicles. According to NS3.AI, the company's shares have fallen by over 15% since January. Investors are particularly interested in the timeline for Tesla's robotaxi project, as well as analyst price targets, which vary significantly from $145 at JPMorgan to $600 at Wedbush.

data.title: Iran's latest response to the Iran-US negotiations: No decision yet made on whether to participate.
data.description: An Iranian source familiar with the matter who participated in the first round of Iran-US talks stated that as of 3 PM local time on the 20th (7:30 PM Beijing time), due to the US's constantly changing words and actions, Iran harbors "deep distrust" of the US, and has not yet decided whether to participate in the second round of talks. The source pointed out that the US attack on Iranian merchant ships on the 19th further complicated the situation. (CCTV News)

data.title: Middle East Oil Prospects Dim Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: The global oil industry faces uncertainty as the ongoing conflict involving Iran impacts prospects for a drilling and fracking boom in the Middle East. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenges faced by the world's largest oil contractors due to geopolitical tensions. The situation has led to a cautious outlook for future investments and operations in the region, affecting the industry's growth potential. As the conflict continues, stakeholders are closely monitoring developments that could further influence the energy sector's trajectory.

data.title: AI Adoption Boosts CPU Market Expectations
data.description:
On April 20, VanEck's Head of Digital Asset Research, Matthew Sigel, shared insights on social media about the evolving landscape of Bitcoin miners diversifying into AI infrastructure. According to BlockBeats, GUC, the world's largest turnkey Bitcoin ASIC design partner, has successfully transitioned into a leading AI-driven CPU design partner, with clients including Google, Microsoft, and the soon-to-enter xAI.

The increasing adoption of AI agents has led to a continuous upward revision of market expectations for the CPU ecosystem. Morgan Stanley projects that Google's CPU shipments will reach 1.5 million units by 2026, doubling the benchmark forecast by HSBC three months ago, which stood at 700,000 units. This surge is primarily driven by the market's accelerated shift from traditional x86 architecture. As a result, GUC's stock surged 10% last night, reaching a historic high.

data.title: Iran plans to send a delegation to Pakistan this week for the second round of negotiations.
data.description: According to the Associated Press: Two Pakistani officials said on Monday that Iran has indicated its willingness to send a delegation to Islamabad this week for the second round of talks. For security reasons, Pakistan will not disclose details of the travel plans. (Jinshi)

data.title: Strategy spent $2.54 billion to purchase 34,164 BTC.
data.description: According to market sources, Strategy has purchased 34,164 bitcoins for a total of approximately $2.54 billion.

data.title: Former Goldman Sachs Executive Joins DRW Holdings from XBTO
data.description:
Javier Rodriguez-Alarcon, a former managing director at Goldman Sachs Group Inc., has transitioned to DRW Holdings LLC, a prominent proprietary trading firm, after his tenure at the crypto investment company XBTO. According to Bloomberg, Rodriguez-Alarcon's move marks a significant shift in his career, as he brings his extensive experience in finance to DRW Holdings. His expertise is expected to bolster the firm's trading strategies and operations, particularly in the evolving landscape of financial markets.

Rodriguez-Alarcon's decision to join DRW Holdings comes at a time when the firm is expanding its reach and influence in the trading sector. With a background in both traditional finance and cryptocurrency investments, he is well-positioned to navigate the complexities of modern trading environments. His role at DRW Holdings will likely involve leveraging his knowledge to enhance the firm's competitive edge and adapt to market changes. This move underscores the growing trend of professionals from established financial institutions transitioning to roles within innovative trading firms, reflecting the dynamic nature of the industry.

data.title: Brazilian Economists Forecast Higher Selic Rate by 2026 Year-End
data.description: Economists in Brazil have revised their expectations for the country's Selic interest rate, projecting it to reach 13.00% by the end of 2026, up from a previous forecast of 12.50%. According to Jin10, the forecast for the end of 2027 has also been adjusted, with economists now expecting the rate to be 11.00%, compared to an earlier prediction of 10.50%. These adjustments reflect changing economic conditions and expectations for Brazil's monetary policy in the coming years.

data.title: Gate is now officially connected to the Kasplex L2 network.
data.description: According to official news, Gate has integrated with the Kasplex L2 network and enabled deposits and withdrawals of the Kaspa (KAS) token on the Kasplex L2 network. Users can now withdraw KAS from Kaspa L1 to their Kasplex L2 wallets through Gate, significantly lowering the entry barrier and improving asset transfer efficiency and on-chain interaction experience. Kasplex is a Layer 2 network built on the Kaspa ecosystem, designed to improve smart contract compatibility and transaction processing efficiency, supporting a wider range of decentralized applications (dApps) to operate securely and efficiently within the Kaspa ecosystem. As an L2 network ordered by Kaspa L1, Kasplex still uses KAS as its sole network token.

data.description: 1. Vitalik Buterin envisions Ethereum's future: evolving from a transaction chain to a technological foundation, thereby achieving true user sovereignty; 2. Hyperliquid's per capita revenue reached $78 million in 2025, making it the world's most productive company; 3. Sources: The Bank of Japan may postpone interest rate hikes at its April meeting; 4. data.title: Mastercard Integrates Stablecoins for Card Settlement with SoFi Partnership
data.description: Mastercard is set to incorporate regulated stablecoins into its back-end card settlement processes through a collaboration with SoFi Technologies and its SoFiUSD token. According to NS3.AI, SoFi Bank, N.A. plans to settle Mastercard credit and debit card transactions using SoFiUSD. Additionally, Galileo Financial Technologies will enable banks and fintech issuers on its network to opt into this settlement process. Mastercard has clarified that consumer card usage will remain unaffected, as the stablecoin application is confined to clearing and settlement activities between financial institutions.

data.title: India's Modi Turns Parliamentary Setback into Strategic Advantage
data.description: India Prime Minister Narendra Modi is leveraging his unsuccessful attempt to reform the parliament to his benefit. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting how Modi is strategically using the defeat to strengthen his political position. Despite the setback, Modi is focusing on rallying support and consolidating power within his party. This approach aims to fortify his leadership and influence in the government, ensuring continued progress on his agenda. Modi's ability to turn challenges into opportunities demonstrates his resilience and adaptability in navigating India's complex political landscape.

data.title: Binance Wallet to Launch OpenGradient (OPG) Token Generation Event
data.description:
Binance announced on X the upcoming exclusive Token Generation Event (TGE) for OpenGradient (OPG) through its wallet platform. The event, marking the 46th TGE, is scheduled for April 21, 2026, from 17:00 to 19:00 (UTC+8). Eligible participants are required to use Binance Alpha Points to subscribe to the event. The tokens will be available for claiming and trading starting at 19:00 (UTC+8) on the same day.

In addition to the main event, Binance has allocated an extra 23,000,000 OPG tokens for future activities. Details regarding these activities will be announced separately. The TGE details and the event page are set to be released soon, providing users with comprehensive information on participation requirements and token distribution. This initiative reflects Binance's ongoing efforts to engage its community through exclusive events and token offerings.

data.title: MENA Conflict Highlights Growing Demand for On-Chain Settlement and Stablecoins
data.description: ChangeNOW has highlighted the increasing demand for on-chain settlement and stablecoins amid the ongoing MENA conflict. According to NS3.AI, the company linked this perspective to the opening of its new office in Dubai. The commentary also pointed to the postponement of TOKEN2049 Dubai to 2027 and Saudi Arabia's 30-day suspension of vessel documentation requirements as indicators of regional disruption and adaptation.

data.title: Coinbase will launch BASED1 perpetual contract trading.
data.description: According to official sources, Coinbase will launch BASED1 perpetual contract trading on April 20th. The BASED1-PERP market will be open in regions where liquidity conditions are met and trading is supported.

data.title: Solana's Pacifica Launches Vaults Feature on Testnet
data.description:
Pacifica, a perpetual contract trading platform within the Solana ecosystem, has announced the launch of its Vaults feature on the testnet. According to BlockBeats, users can explore existing vaults and deposit funds to follow strategies for earning returns. Additionally, users have the option to create their own vaults, set deposit limits, and manage trading parameters.

The platform also revealed that Pacifica users included in the April 18 snapshot will receive a weekly loyalty bonus of triple points. Currently, the platform has distributed approximately 333 million points, with weekly trading volumes reaching $24.55 billion.
